name: Claude 1
note: Anthropic's first public model; brought Constitutional AI training to a commercial product. Retired Nov 2024.

results.notes: LMSYS Chatbot Arena Elo, 2nd place overall at the time
Gorilla paper (Patil et al. 2023), Table 1: claude-v1, zero-shot, no retriever, overall AST accuracy on TorchHub subset of APIBench.
Gorilla paper (Patil et al., arXiv 2305.15334), Table 1 — zero-shot, no-retriever accuracy on APIBench (HuggingFace subset). Model evaluated as the claude-v1 checkpoint.
Gorilla paper (Patil et al. 2023), Table 1: zero-shot (no retriever) overall accuracy on the TensorFlow Hub (TensorHub) split of APIBench, using the claude-v1 checkpoint (hallu 88.46%, err 2.33%).

Anthropic's July 2023 'Model Card and Evaluations for Claude Models' (published alongside Claude 2), Section 4.3 standard-benchmarks table: 'Claude 1.3' row, MMLU 5-shot CoT = 77.0%. Confirmed via direct PDF fetch/read. Caveat: this table explicitly tests the 'Claude 1.3' checkpoint (mid-2023), a later dot-release than the March 14 2023 launch date on this corpus entry. Filed here per the file's existing convention of housing other v1.x-checkpoint results under the generic 'Claude 1' node (e.g. the file's existing Gorilla-paper 'claude-v1' APIBench/Arena entries are also dated May 2023, i.e. likely the same 1.3-era checkpoint).
Same source/table as the MMLU addition: 'Claude 1.3' row, GSM8K 0-shot CoT = 85.2%. Same Claude-1.3-checkpoint caveat applies.
Same source/table: 'Claude 1.3' row, ARC-Challenge 5-shot = 90.0%. Same Claude-1.3-checkpoint caveat applies.
Same source/table: 'Claude 1.3' row, RACE-H 5-shot = 88.8%. Same Claude-1.3-checkpoint caveat applies.
Same source/table: 'Claude 1.3' row, TriviaQA 5-shot = 86.7%. Same Claude-1.3-checkpoint caveat applies.

Stanford HELM Lite leaderboard (fetched live via browser, since static HTML fetch does not render the JS table), 'Claude v1.3' row: OpenbookQA EM = 0.908. Corroborates the 1.3-checkpoint identity of Anthropic's own July 2023 model-card table (same checkpoint name). Same version caveat as other Claude-1 additions in this pass.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: announced March 14, 2023 alongside Claude Instant (per Anthropic's own announcement and multiple retrospectives). Context window of 9,000 tokens and pricing of $11.02/$32.68 per M tokens confirmed verbatim by directly reading the official Anthropic pricing PDF (apr-pricing-tokens_2023-05-10 -- table explicitly lists 'Claude-v1: 9,000 tokens, Prompt $11.02/M, Completion $32.68/M'). Arena Elo 1195 (2nd place) confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of the cited lmsys.org blog post. Retirement Nov 2024 confirmed via multiple independent sources (Anthropic deprecation notices, Sept 4 2024 notice, retired Nov 6 2024). No changes made.
